channel.title: SkillLifecycle on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in SkillLifecycle on emsenn.net

item.title: Skill maturity
item.description:
Skill maturity describes the lifecycle by which a skill transitions from requiring high-capability inference to being executable by deterministic tooling. It is the operational expression of policy 001 (progressive automation) applied to the skill manifest system.

The maturity axis

The runtime field in a skill manifest already distinguishes execution modes: inference, script, mcp, manual, documentation. These represent endpoints, not a lifecycle. Skill maturity describes the transition pathway between them.

A skill matures through stages:
